params.qin: ("Tjangara" AND (giant OR spirit OR Australia)) AND mediatype:texts
params.query: ((text:Tjangara OR text:Tjangara OR text__reviews:Tjangara) AND ((text:giant OR text:giant OR text__reviews:giant) OR (text:spirit OR text:spirit OR text__reviews:spirit) OR (text:Australia OR text:Australia OR text__reviews:Australia))) AND mediatype:texts
